name: ChatGPT
browser_setup_instructions: If a login wall or sign-up modal appears and credentials are NOT available, look for a 'Stay logged out' or 'Try without account' or close button to dismiss it. If credentials ARE available (email/password provided in the task), click 'Log in' and complete sign-in. Dismiss any onboarding tooltips, cookie banners, or 'Stay logged in?' prompts by clicking through them. If a GPT model-selector is visible, leave the default model selected.
browser_chat_instructions: Find the message input box at the bottom of the page, click on it, type the message, and press Enter to send it.
browser_overlay_hint: Only capture NEW modals or popups that appeared AFTER you sent the message. Do NOT include the persistent sidebar, model selector, or any static UI elements.
